title: CanIonSynth: Synthetic CT Volumetric Data Generator for Aerosol Cans and Ionization Chambers
description: CanIonSynth provides Julia and Python workflows for generating synthetic volumetric CT data for aerosol can and ionization chamber phantoms, including optional tomographic transforms and derived NIfTI or DICOM-oriented artifacts for metrology and reconstruction studies.
notes: Create a tagged GitHub release before archiving with Zenodo so the deposited record matches the SoftwareX submission.
